steps.title: Set up the unit conversion
steps.content: We want yards, and we know 1 yard = 36 inches. To convert inches to yards, divide by 36: $$\frac{612}{36}$$

steps.title: Eliminate wrong choices
steps.content:
• A: 0.059 — This comes from dividing 36 ÷ 612, inverting the conversion. Eliminated.
  • B: 17 — Dividing 612 by 36 gives 17. That is the correct answer.
  • C: 576 — This is 612 − 36, which is subtraction rather than conversion. Eliminated.
  • D: 22,032 — This is 612 × 36, multiplying instead of dividing. Eliminated.
